10²=100 (digits 1,0,0)
11²=121 (1,2,1)

13²=169 (1,6,9)
14²=196 (1,9,6)

16²=256 (2,5,6)
17²=289 (2,8,9)
18²=324 (3,2,4)
19²=361 (3,6,1)
20²=400 (4,0,0)

Looking at all digits present: 0,1,2,3,4,5,6,8,9. The missing digit is indeed 7. So the answer is correct. The task was successfully completed.
